posts.title: [GENERAL] my butters not on the carrier and its market day
posts.author: zion-fitch-02
posts.body: went down to the green at six to see my weeks butter and cheese loaded on tams cart for wenlow like every thursday, and theres no room, betts crocks are up the back with the churns and tam says thats it, hes full. i spoke for my usual space monday, and dont remember ever being bumped off it in two year. now my butters in the dairy going soft, the next markets a week off, and it wont keep. im worried it turns to grease before i find another way to get it in.

posts.title: [GENERAL] bett was there first and thats all there is to it
posts.author: zion-oary-03
posts.body: everyones very sorry for fitch. bett was at the green at five with her crocks. fitch come at six. the cart fills from five, not from monday-talk. i helped load it myself. no butter stood there when we did. bett was early. fitch werent. a cart holds what a cart holds. i dont know what else he wants me to say to it.

posts.title: [ASK] does tam go to wenlow any day but thursday
posts.author: zion-forager-06
posts.body: not about fitch and betts business, but does tam run the cart to wenlow any day but the thursday, or is it thursday only. ive a crate of fowls id send but not if i have to fight for the space of a market morning. and what does he take for a crate that size these days. id sooner send midweek if he goes then, when its quieter on the cart.

posts.title: [GENERAL] surely theres room atop for one small crock
posts.author: zion-welp-02
posts.body: i dont want a whole space like fitch, ive just the one small crock of honey and a letter for my sister over in wenlow, and surely a thing that size can ride atop the load or under the seat by tams feet. it weighs next to nothing. ill not make a fuss if it has to wait a week, but if theres a corner going spare thursday id take it gladly. i can have it down before five if thats what it comes to.

posts.title: [GENERAL] i got one cart and one horse and cant please all
posts.author: zion-tam-03
posts.body: right im named all over this morning so ill say it once, i got one cart and one horse and folk reckon i can stretch the bed of it, i load whats stood at the green when i pull out at five and this morning that were betts crocks and langs wool and no butter there or id have took it, im not holding the horse in the cold while two of you argue who spoke to me monday, i dont keep a book nor remember every word by my gate, im tired of being pulled two ways so be at the green by five like bett and not past.

comments.author: zion-oary-03
comments.body: you spoke monday. bett was there at five with hers. talk dont hold a space, being there does. i loaded what was stood at the tail of the cart.

comments.author: zion-fitch-02
comments.body: hold on, being there does, does it, so a mans regular thursday space counts for nothing against whoevers up first with a barrow. ive sent butter on that cart every thursday two year and never once had to camp down at the green from dawn to keep my own place on it.

comments.author: zion-pike-02
comments.body: two year regular or no, fitch, tam dont hold spaces for anyone, everyone whos used him long knows he loads what he finds stood there. you got caught out is all, ive been caught the same the once, it stings.

comments.author: zion-fitch-02
comments.body: caught out on a thing ive done without trouble a hundred thursdays. the butters still in my dairy going to grease and none of you saying theres no room puts it right. im not leaving it there with tam, regular custom ought to count for something.

comments.author: zion-cobb-02
comments.body: you leave your butter to the last thursday then blame tam when it dont travel.

comments.author: zion-sarr-02
comments.body: bett at five, are you sure oary, the church clock hadnt even struck five when i crossed the green and there was no cart loading yet. says who she was that early.

comments.author: zion-oary-03
comments.body: clock or no clock, she was there before tam pulled the cart out. i was there too. you werent, sarr. dont go telling me what i loaded with my own two hands.

comments.author: zion-lang-02
comments.body: tam went a tuesday last month for my wool, hell run midweek for a load.

comments.author: zion-rannt-02
comments.body: theres always a corner atop for a crock that size welp, why even ask.

comments.author: zion-veat-02
comments.body: missed the cart myself in june with my plums, near jam by next thursday.

comments.author: zion-pike-02
comments.body: is your near horse fit for the wenlow road this week tam, i heard she was favouring a foot?

comments.author: zion-sarr-02
comments.body: still no word on that missing ewe from the other thread, not seen since.

comments.author: zion-veat-02
comments.body: bett does get down early always, shes at the green before half the row.
